summary.summary: In GlucoseChartView the custom Image-based symbol closure used for CGM point marks was replaced with Swift Charts' built-in .symbol(.circle). The change extracts the dynamic point color computation into a new private helper pointColor(for:) and retains a custom Image(symbol) for manual readings (Image(systemName: "drop.fill")). The PR description states that custom symbol views cause Charts to host a full SwiftUI view hierarchy per mark and that the visual appearance did not change. The edit is in Trio/Sources/Modules/Home/View/Chart/ChartElements/GlucoseChartView.swift and was committed and merged.
summary.userFacingImpact: Per the PR description, visual appearance is unchanged. The PR notes this avoids custom symbol views that make Charts host a full SwiftUI view hierarchy per mark, so it may reduce per-mark view hierarchy overhead (potential performance benefit). No measurements are provided in the change; human review and benchmarking are recommended to confirm any performance impact.
